cb_step_1.title: Select Pelvic Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: In the 'Input CT Volume' field, choose the Pelvic Volume.

cb_step_4.title: Exclude Fragments
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick any fragments to exclude them from planning.

cb_step_7.title: Manually Adjust Fragment?
cb_step_7.instruction: Check the 'Manually adjust a fragment' checkbox, or leave unchecked to skip adjustment.

cb_step_8.title: Select Fragment
cb_step_8.instruction: In the 'Fragment' dropdown, choose the fragment to adjust.

cb_step_9.title: Adjust Fragment Pose
cb_step_9.instruction: Use the transform controls to adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

cb_step_12.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
cb_step_12.instruction: Check the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to adjust screws, or leave unchecked to finish.

cb_step_13.title: Adjust Trajectories
cb_step_13.instruction: Use the transform controls to adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.

operation_descriptions: Execute registration and reduction of fracture fragments
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply manual adjustments to the selected fragment
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw models from edited trajectories
Deselect the edit screw trajectories checkbox

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
